name: Stolen Life
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: "GetItOffGetItOffGetItOff!"
granted_abilities.text: Another friendly model may target this model with the Interact action to remove this upgrade.

granted_abilities.name: Serve the Throne
granted_abilities.text: When this model activates, the enemy leader heals 2. Then, deal 2 damage to this model.
